items.html: For after the first time, there is never one who raises MAN [Mayin Nukvin] except the sons who have already come out into the world and been corrected. And every lower one is called a son to the one above it, and it is he who raises the MAN to it — understand this well. It follows that ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] are sons to AVI [Aba ve Ima]. At the first time, AVI coupled of themselves, as it is written, "and there was no man to till the ground." And at the second time, when ZON had already been corrected, it is they who raise MAN to AVI, always; and no Zivug [coupling] is possible at all unless MAN is raised.
